title: SpotOptim.SpotOptimConfig
---



```python
SpotOptim.SpotOptimConfig(
    bounds=None,
    max_iter=20,
    n_initial=10,
    surrogate=None,
    acquisition='y',
    var_type=None,
    var_name=None,
    var_trans=None,
    tolerance_x=None,
    max_time=np.inf,
    repeats_initial=1,
    repeats_surrogate=1,
    ocba_delta=0,
    tensorboard_log=False,
    tensorboard_path=None,
    tensorboard_clean=False,
    fun_mo2so=None,
    seed=None,
    verbose=False,
    warnings_filter='ignore',
    n_infill_points=1,
    max_surrogate_points=None,
    selection_method='distant',
    acquisition_failure_strategy='random',
    penalty=False,
    penalty_val=None,
    acquisition_fun_return_size=3,
    acquisition_optimizer='differential_evolution',
    restart_after_n=100,
    restart_inject_best=True,
    max_restarts=None,
    x0=None,
    de_x0_prob=0.1,
    tricands_fringe=False,
    prob_de_tricands=0.8,
    window_size=None,
    min_tol_metric='chebyshev',
    prob_surrogate=None,
    acquisition_optimizer_kwargs=None,
    args=(),
    kwargs=None,
)
```

Configuration parameters for SpotOptim.

## Attributes {.doc-section .doc-section-attributes}

| Name                         | Type                                                                                                            | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| bounds                       | [Optional](`typing.Optional`)\[[list](`list`)\]                                                                 | Bounds for the input variables.                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| max_iter                     | [int](`int`)                                                                                                    | Maximum number of iterations.                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| n_initial                    | [int](`int`)                                                                                                    | Number of initial points.                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| surrogate                    | [Optional](`typing.Optional`)\[[object](`object`)\]                                                             | Surrogate model.                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| acquisition                  | [str](`str`)                                                                                                    | Acquisition function.                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| var_type                     | [Optional](`typing.Optional`)\[[list](`list`)\]                                                                 | Type of variables.                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| var_name                     | [Optional](`typing.Optional`)\[[list](`list`)\]                                                                 | Name of variables.                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| var_trans                    | [Optional](`typing.Optional`)\[[list](`list`)\]                                                                 | Transformation of variables.                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| tolerance_x                  | [Optional](`typing.Optional`)\[[float](`float`)\]                                                               | Tolerance for input variables.                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| max_time                     | [float](`float`)                                                                                                | Maximum time.                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| repeats_initial              | [int](`int`)                                                                                                    | Number of repeats for initial points.                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| repeats_surrogate            | [int](`int`)                                                                                                    | Number of repeats for surrogate points.                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| ocba_delta                   | [int](`int`)                                                                                                    | Delta for OCBA.                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| tensorboard_log              | [bool](`bool`)                                                                                                  | Whether to log to TensorBoard.                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| tensorboard_path             | [Optional](`typing.Optional`)\[[str](`str`)\]                                                                   | Path to TensorBoard logs.                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| tensorboard_clean            | [bool](`bool`)                                                                                                  | Whether to clean old TensorBoard logs (the configured tensorboard_path, or the 'runs' folder if no path is set).                                                                                                           |
| fun_mo2so                    | [Optional](`typing.Optional`)\[[Callable](`typing.Callable`)\]                                                  | Function to convert multi-objective to single-objective.                                                                                                                                                                   |
| seed                         | [Optional](`typing.Optional`)\[[int](`int`)\]                                                                   | Seed for random number generator.                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| verbose                      | [bool](`bool`)                                                                                                  | Whether to print verbose output.                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| warnings_filter              | [Literal](`typing.Literal`)\[\'default\', \'error\', \'ignore\'\]                                               | Filter for warnings.                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| n_infill_points              | [int](`int`)                                                                                                    | Number of infill points.                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| max_surrogate_points         | [Optional](`typing.Optional`)\[[Union](`typing.Union`)\[[int](`int`), [List](`typing.List`)\[[int](`int`)\]\]\] | Maximum number of surrogate points.                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| selection_method             | [str](`str`)                                                                                                    | Method for selecting infill points.                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| acquisition_failure_strategy | [str](`str`)                                                                                                    | Strategy for handling acquisition function failures.                                                                                                                                                                       |
| penalty                      | [bool](`bool`)                                                                                                  | Whether to use penalty.                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| penalty_val                  | [Optional](`typing.Optional`)\[[float](`float`)\]                                                               | Penalty value.                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| acquisition_fun_return_size  | [int](`int`)                                                                                                    | Size of the acquisition function return.                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| acquisition_optimizer        | [Union](`typing.Union`)\[[str](`str`), [Callable](`typing.Callable`)\]                                          | Optimizer for the acquisition function.                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| restart_after_n              | [int](`int`)                                                                                                    | Number of iterations after which to restart.                                                                                                                                                                               |
| restart_inject_best          | [bool](`bool`)                                                                                                  | Whether to inject the best point after restart.                                                                                                                                                                            |
| max_restarts                 | [Optional](`typing.Optional`)\[[int](`int`)\]                                                                   | Patience-based early-stopping. When set, the optimizer terminates after this many consecutive restarts that fail to improve the best objective value. ``None`` (default) disables the check and preserves legacy behavior. |
| x0                           | [Optional](`typing.Optional`)\[[np](`numpy`).[ndarray](`numpy.ndarray`)\]                                       | Initial guess for the input variables.                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| de_x0_prob                   | [float](`float`)                                                                                                | Probability of using differential evolution for initial guess.                                                                                                                                                             |
| tricands_fringe              | [bool](`bool`)                                                                                                  | Whether to use fringe for tricands.                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| prob_de_tricands             | [float](`float`)                                                                                                | Probability of using tricands for differential evolution.                                                                                                                                                                  |
| window_size                  | [Optional](`typing.Optional`)\[[int](`int`)\]                                                                   | Size of the window for tricands.                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| min_tol_metric               | [str](`str`)                                                                                                    | Metric for minimum tolerance.                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| prob_surrogate               | [Optional](`typing.Optional`)\[[List](`typing.List`)\[[float](`float`)\]\]                                      | Probability of using surrogate.                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| acquisition_optimizer_kwargs | [Optional](`typing.Optional`)\[[Dict](`typing.Dict`)\[[str](`str`), [Any](`typing.Any`)\]\]                     | Keyword arguments for the acquisition function optimizer.                                                                                                                                                                  |
| args                         | [Tuple](`typing.Tuple`)                                                                                         | Arguments for the objective function.                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| kwargs                       | [Optional](`typing.Optional`)\[[Dict](`typing.Dict`)\[[str](`str`), [Any](`typing.Any`)\]\]                     | Keyword arguments for the objective function.                                                                                                                                                                              |

## Examples {.doc-section .doc-section-examples}


::: {#95e7b401 .cell execution_count=1}
``` {.python .cell-code}
import numpy as np
from spotoptim.SpotOptim import SpotOptim
from sklearn.gaussian_process import GaussianProcessRegressor
from spotoptim.SpotOptim import SpotOptimConfig
from sklearn.gaussian_process.kernels import Matern, ConstantKernel

kernel = ConstantKernel(1.0, (1e-2, 1e12)) * Matern(length_scale=1.0, length_scale_bounds=(1e-4, 1e2), nu=2.5)
surrogate = GaussianProcessRegressor(kernel=kernel, n_restarts_optimizer=100)

config = SpotOptimConfig(
     bounds=[(0, 1), (0, 1)],
     max_iter=20,
     n_initial=10,
     surrogate=surrogate,
     acquisition="y",
     var_type=["continuous", "continuous"],
     var_name=["x1", "x2"],
     var_trans=["identity", "identity"],
     tolerance_x=1e-6,
     max_time=np.inf,
     repeats_initial=1,
     repeats_surrogate=1,
     ocba_delta=0,
     tensorboard_log=False,
     tensorboard_path=None,
     tensorboard_clean=False,
     fun_mo2so=None,
     seed=None,
     verbose=False,
     warnings_filter="ignore",
     n_infill_points=1,
     max_surrogate_points=None,
     selection_method="distant",
     acquisition_failure_strategy="random",
     penalty=False,
     penalty_val=None,
     acquisition_fun_return_size=3,
     acquisition_optimizer="differential_evolution",
     restart_after_n=100,
     restart_inject_best=True,
     max_restarts=None,
     x0=None,
     de_x0_prob=0.1,
     tricands_fringe=False,
     prob_de_tricands=0.8,
     window_size=None,
     min_tol_metric="chebyshev",
     prob_surrogate=None,
     acquisition_optimizer_kwargs=None,
     args=(),
     kwargs=None,
)
```
:::
